scan.title: Scanning for Devices
scan.description: Found {count} WCH device(s). If your device is not listed, make sure it's advertising and within range. If it still doesn't appear, try restarting Home Assistant or moving the BLE adapter closer.

select_service.title: Set Up Gateway
select_service.description:
This device will act as the mesh gateway connected to Home Assistant. The gateway communicates with other mesh devices via BLE.

Device: {device}

provision_configure.title: Provision New Device
provision_configure.description:
Configure network settings to add this device to your mesh network.

Device: {device}

error.no_devices_found: No BLEHome devices found within range. Make sure the device is advertising (LED blinking) and try again.
error.scan_failed: Failed to scan for Bluetooth devices.
error.service_scan_failed: Failed to retrieve services from the device. The device may have gone out of range.
error.invalid_mac: The MAC address provided is invalid.
error.no_services_found: No suitable services found on this device.
error.invalid_key_length: Network key must be exactly 32 hex characters (16 bytes).
error.invalid_key_hex: Network key contains invalid hex characters.
error.invalid_address: Node address must be between 1 and 32767 (0x7FFF).

abort.provisioned_device: This device ({address}) is already provisioned and belongs to a mesh network. If you already have a gateway, the device should be auto-discovered. Otherwise, use the manual scan to set up a new gateway.
abort.provision_success:
Successfully provisioned device at mesh address {address}.

The device will now restart and join the mesh network. If a gateway is already configured, the new device will be discovered automatically within a few minutes.
abort.provision_failed: Provisioning failed: {error}. Make sure the device is within range and try again.

init.title: BLEHome Options
init.description: Configure {count} sub-device(s). Sub-devices are discovered automatically by the gateway after provisioning.

debug_status.name: Debug status
debug_status.description: Dump the current debug status of the BLEHome gateway to the log.

debug_inject_bthome.name: Inject BTHome mock
debug_inject_bthome.description: Inject a mock BTHome advertisement through the gateway for testing purposes.

remove_subdevice.name: Remove sub-device
remove_subdevice.description: Remove a mesh sub-device from the gateway and clean up its registries. Sends an unprovision command to the device over the mesh network.

ota_update.name: OTA update
ota_update.description: Perform a firmware OTA update on a connected sub-device through the gateway.
